source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A mass-loaded piston/cylinder, containing air, is at 300 kPa, 17\circ\text{C} with a volume of 0.25 m^3, while at the stops V= 1 m^3. An air line, 500 kPa, 600 K, is connected by a valve that is then opened until a final inside pressure of 400 kPa is reached, at which point T= 350 K. Find the heat transfer.
